name: Fairways Golf
about: Fairways Golf is an indoor golf destination in Texarkana, offering a variety of simulator bays for play, practice, and events. The facility provides over 500 world-class courses to play from the comfort of their bays, which are available for both left and right-handed players. The venue features private bays fitted with golf equipment and hosts events & leagues, positioning itself as a comprehensive golf experience center. Hours of operation are Tuesday-Saturday from 9am-11pm and Sunday from 2pm-9pm.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 500 world-class golf courses from an indoor setting
Spacious private bays accommodating up to 8 people for groups
Dedicated bays for both left and right-handed players
Comprehensive event and league hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: Granola bars are available for purchase ($1.50).
No alcohol available for sale, BYOB is not mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Brand and model not specified on the website.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides fitted clubs and golf equipment, so bringing your own is not necessary.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks can be kept at the provided tables, but NO FOOD OR DRINK is allowed inside the simulator at any time. Granola bars are available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not explicitly stated, but you can finish your 'last hole' unless another group is booked immediately after your reservation time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and accommodates larger groups, making it suitable for families and gatherings.
